---

### Post by ukripper on 2007-06-25
Increase your following 
HorizSync       31.0 - 83.0
    VertRefresh     56.0 - 75.0

to 

```

HorizSync       31.0 - 90.0
VertRefresh     56.0 - 110.0
```

---

### Post by mjwhitfield on 2007-06-25
can anyone explain to an idiot (me) how HorizSync and VertRefresh numbers translate into 50hz, 60hz, 70hz etc...?  is it just a simple maths calculation?
